CustomField.description: Prepayment functionality is already deprecated. Keeping the lookup to track historical prepayments [LOAD: No] [JUSTIFICATION: This field is deprecated] [REPLACEMENT OBJECT API: Operational_Transaction_Register__c] [REPLACEMENT FIELD API: Paid_Amount_New__c] [COMMENTS: Asana link https://app.asana.com/1/7934919496419/project/1108557631023783/task/1211621036412486?focus=true Reason - Created relevant number field for this currency field Version - v57]
CustomField.formula: /*IF(!ISBLANK(Invoice__c),Invoice__r.Amount_Paid_Remaining__c, IF(!ISBLANK(Payments_Credits__c),null, IF(!ISBLANK(Prepayment__c),Prepayment__r.Amount_Paid__c, IF(!ISBLANK(Payables__c),Payables__r.Total_Payout_Amount__c, IF(!ISBLANK(Payouts__c),null, IF(!ISBLANK(Credit_Memo__c),Credit_Memo__r.Allocated_Amount__c, IF(!ISBLANK( Payment_on_Account__c ), Payment_on_Account__r.Amount_Applied__c + Payment_on_Account__r.Amount_Refunded__c ,null)))))))*/null
CustomField.label: Z_Unused_2511 Paid Amount
